user_query:
I’m organizing a small study-group meeting focused on offline study strategies (I’m not into videos). Using the agenda in input/study_meeting_agenda.md, please do the following:

1) Perform web searches to find 3–6 official, text-based study guides that directly address the agenda topics. Only choose documents that are PDFs from academic (.edu) or nonprofit (.org) domains. Do not include videos, video pages, or blog posts. Prefer printable guides.

2) Download the selected PDFs into downloads/ with descriptive, safe filenames.

3) Create outputs/sources.csv with a header and one row per selected source, with these fields:
   - title
   - organization (e.g., department or publisher)
   - domain (must end with .edu or .org)
   - file_type (must be "pdf")
   - local_path (relative path under downloads/)
   - file_size_bytes
   - verification_hash (SHA256 of the local file)
   - topic_coverage (comma-separated subset of agenda topics matched)
   - retrieved_on (ISO 8601 date)

4) Prepare outputs/meeting_notes.md with these sections:
   - Agenda (populate from input/study_meeting_agenda.md)
   - Sources Overview (briefly list each source and what topics it covers)
   - Key Takeaways per Topic (summarize insights from the PDFs for each agenda topic)
   - Action Items for Next Study Meeting (5–10 concrete, offline-focused items). Each action item must cite at least one source by title and page number or section heading.

5) Generate outputs/inspection_report.json capturing:
   - total_candidates (number of resources you considered from searching)
   - total_selected (number included in sources.csv)
   - duplicates_removed (count of items removed based on identical SHA256 hashes)
   - unusable_count (PDFs excluded because text wasn’t accessible or they were primarily slides/images)
   - unusable_details (array with {title, domain, reason})

6) Add outputs/README.md that lists the search queries you used, your inclusion criteria, and a short rationale for each selected source.

Notes:
- Base all notes and action items only on the downloaded PDFs.
- Exclude any resource that is primarily video, audio, or non-text.
- Ensure all local paths in outputs/sources.csv exist and the hashes match the actual files.
- Keep everything reproducible and contained within the workspace under downloads/ and outputs/.
 All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
